index.html.title: IKE Maven Plugin Support
index.html.keywords: Maven plugin,workspace management,release orchestration,gitflow,IKE Network,knowledge engineering
index.html.body: IKE Maven Plugin Support ike-maven-plugin-support is the shared library of helper classes used by the IKE Maven plugins (ike-maven-plugin and ike-workspace-maven-plugin). It’s not a plugin itself — it has no mojos. It exists to keep the two plugins consistent without one plugin depending on the other. Coordinate Value Group ID network.ike.tooling Artifact ID ike-maven-plugin-support Packaging jar Why a separate module ike-maven-plugin and ike-workspace-maven-plugin need shared code for: Consistent goal-result reporting (the per-goal markdown reports). Shared parameter parsing and validation. The compile-time goal registry that catches mojo / enum drift. Version-upgrade plan computation (used by both ws:versions-upgrade and ike:versions-upgrade). Having one plugin depend on the other would create an awkward release-order constraint and a circular conceptual reference. Pulling the shared code into a third library keeps the dependency direction clean: both plugins depend on ike-maven-plugin-support, which depends on neither. Key classes Class Role AbstractGoalMojo Base class for any mojo that produces a per-goal markdown report. Centralizes the report-write path and the file-naming convention (<goal-name>.md). GoalReport Builder for the structured markdown reports goals emit. Sections, tables, callouts. GoalRef Type-safe reference to a goal (rather than a string literal). Lets the compiler catch typo’d goal names in @see and similar references. MojoParamSupport Shared parameter parsing — coercion of -Dprop=val strings into typed values, with consistent error messages on bad input. support.upgrade.* The version-upgrade plan model: scanner, candidate resolver, plan builder, plan applier. Used by both plugins. The goal registry pattern Both ike-maven-plugin and ike-workspace-maven-plugin declare their goals twice: once as a @Mojo-annotated class (the implementation) and once as an entry in a corresponding IkeGoal or WsGoal enum (the catalog). A custom annotation processor checks at compile time that every mojo has a matching enum entry — so the help output, the markdown report filenames, and the goal implementations cannot drift apart. ike-maven-plugin-support provides the supporting types (GoalRef, base mojo class, report writer) that make this pattern work uniformly across both plugins. Source GitHub: ike-tooling/ike-maven-plugin-support[1] Issues: IKE-Network/ike-issues[2]

URL: https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite[9] Project Licenses: The Apache Software License, Version 2.0[10] org.openrewrite.tools:jgit:jar:1.4.1 (provided) jgit Description: Fork of jgit to maintain Java 8 compatibility URL: https://github.com/openrewrite/jgit[56] Project Licenses: The Apache Software License, Version 2.0[10] com.googlecode.javaewah:JavaEWAH:jar:1.1.13 (provided) JavaEWAH Description: The bit array data structure is implemented in Java as the BitSet class. Unfortunately, this fails to scale without compression. JavaEWAH is a word-aligned compressed variant of the Java bitset class. It uses a 64-bit run-length encoding (RLE) compression scheme. The goal of word-aligned compression is not to achieve the best compression, but rather to improve query processing time. Hence, we try to save CPU cycles, maybe at the expense of storage. However, the EWAH scheme we implemented is always more efficient storage-wise than an uncompressed bitmap (implemented in Java as the BitSet class). Unlike some alternatives, javaewah does not rely on a patented scheme. URL: https://github.com/lemire/javaewah[33] Project Licenses: Apache 2[10] com.fasterxml.jackson.core:jackson-core:jar:2.21.2 (provided) Jackson-core Description: Core Jackson processing abstractions (aka Streaming API), implementation for JSON URL: https://github.com/FasterXML/jackson-core[27] Project Licenses: The Apache Software License, Version 2.0[2] com.fasterxml.jackson.core:jackson-databind:jar:2.21.2 (provided) jackson-databind Description: General data-binding functionality for Jackson: works on core streaming API URL: https://github.com/FasterXML/jackson[26] Project Licenses: The Apache Software License, Version 2.0[2] com.fasterxml.jackson.dataformat:jackson-dataformat-smile:jar:2.21.2 (provided) Jackson dataformat: Smile Description: Support for reading and writing Smile ("binary JSON") encoded data using Jackson abstractions (streaming API, data binding, tree model) URL: https://github.com/FasterXML/jackson-dataformats-binary[28] Project Licenses: The Apache Software License, Version 2.0[2] com.fasterxml.jackson.module:jackson-module-parameter-names:jar:2.21.2 (provided) Jackson-module-parameter-names Description: Add-on module for Jackson (https://github.com/FasterXML/jackson) to support introspection of method/constructor parameter names, without having to add explicit property name annotation. Maven Coordinates Apache Maven <dependency>
  <groupId>network.ike.tooling</groupId>
  <artifactId>ike-maven-plugin-support</artifactId>
  <version>149</version>
</dependency> Apache Ivy <dependency org="network.ike.tooling" name="ike-maven-plugin-support" rev="149">
  <artifact name="ike-maven-plugin-support" type="jar" />
</dependency> Groovy Grape @Grapes(
@Grab(group='network.ike.tooling', module='ike-maven-plugin-support', version='149')
) Gradle/Grails implementation 'network.ike.tooling:ike-maven-plugin-support:149' Scala SBT libraryDependencies += "network.ike.tooling" % "ike-maven-plugin-support" % "149" Leiningen [network.ike.tooling/ike-maven-plugin-support "149"]

project-info.html.title: Project Information
project-info.html.keywords: Maven plugin,workspace management,release orchestration,gitflow,IKE Network,knowledge engineering
project-info.html.body: Project Information This document provides an overview of the various documents and links that are part of this project's general information. All of this content is automatically generated by Maven[1] on behalf of the project. Overview Document Description About[2] Shared library for IKE Maven plugins: goal identifier interface, base Mojo with per-goal report writing, self-healing gitignore, and interactive parameter resolution helpers. Summary[3] This document lists other related information of this project Licenses[4] This document lists the project license(s). Dependencies[5] This document lists the project's dependencies and provides information on each dependency. Maven Coordinates[6] This document describes how to include this project as a dependency using various dependency management tools. Dependency Management[7] This document lists the dependencies that are defined through dependencyManagement. Plugins[8] This document lists the build plugins and the report plugins used by this project. Plugin Management[9] This document lists the plugins that are defined through pluginManagement. Distribution Management[10] This document provides informations on the distribution management of this project.

project-reports.html.body: Generated Reports This document provides an overview of the various reports that are automatically generated by Maven[1] . Each report is briefly described below. Overview Document Description JaCoCo[2] JaCoCo Coverage Report.
